arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives Man Utd transfer window update and reveals their biggest focus
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim is preparing for his first transfer window as Manchester United manager but insists his focus is on some key games before January comes around

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim reacts to Dan Ashworth's shock Man Utd exit
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has spoken publicly for the first time since Dan Ashworth's shock departure just five months after starting his job as sporting director.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim says Dan Ashworth’s Manchester United exit ‘not the best situation’
arts.sum: Ashworth’s departure was met by surprise from afar as well as inside United.

arts.ttl: Man United head coach Ruben Amorim reacts to "bad situation" following shock Dan Ashworth departure
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim brands sporting director Dan Ashworth's surprise exit from Old Trafford "a bad situation".

arts.ttl: Man United monitoring 9 G/A star to replace Joshua Zirkzee with swap deal a potential option
arts.sum: Man United are currently on the lookout for a new number nine and it is being reported that a big name from Serie A has been added to their list. 2025 will be a big year for the Manchester club as the transfer windows will be the first since the arrival of Ruben Amorim at […] The post Man United monitoring 9 G/A star to replace Joshua Zirkzee with swap deal a potential option appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim breaks his silence on Dan Ashworth's sacking after former Man United sporting director was axed by Sir Jim Ratcliffe just five months after starting work at Old Trafford
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER: Ashworth was involved in the process to bring in Amorim from Sporting Lisbon as Erik ten Hag's replacement, but only had a few weeks to work with the new head coach.

arts.ttl: 'Bad situation' - Ruben Amorim breaks silence on Dan Ashworth leaving Manchester United
arts.sum: Dan Ashworth left Man United on Saturday after a mere five months and six days as the club's inaugural sporting director.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim gives honest response as he breaks silence on Dan Ashworth's Man Utd sacking
arts.sum: Manchester United confirmed the exit of Dan Ashworth last week after just five months at Old Trafford and new Red Devils boss Ruben Amorim has shared his thoughts on the situation

arts.ttl: Man Utd face Osimhen threat due to 'special relationship'
arts.sum: Man Utd face Osimhen threat due to'special relationship' PSG rival Man Utd for Osimhen

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo has done something very impressive in almost half the time as Cole Palmer this season
arts.sum: Doubt Amad Diallo at your own peril 🔥
